topic: Energy is not only about stimulation
continuity_tokens: same Japanese professional in early 30s across shots 01 to 03
same pale oak and mist-blue palette
Mitozz bottle must stay deep matte black with a black ribbed cap, a visible pale white neck band below the cap, and a predominantly black front face with centered white MITOZZ wordmark
visible front label must keep MITOZZ centered on the front, with 60 Capsules at bottom left and Net Weight: 30 g at bottom right when readable in frame
visual_intent: product introduced naturally into the same routine world
foundation-first lifestyle scene with pack truth
negative space preserved for edit text
brand_guardrails: preserve the real Mitozz bottle silhouette, cap, and label
preserve the bottle appearance exactly: deep matte black body, black ribbed cap, visible pale white neck band below the cap, and predominantly black front face
the visible front label must read MITOZZ, with 60 Capsules and Net Weight: 30 g in the footer when readable in frame
the bottle should feel integrated into the ritual, not isolated like an ad cutout
the scene must be true full-bleed 4:5
reject and regenerate if bottle color changes or if the label becomes unreadable, simplified, or invented
reject and regenerate if MITOZZ, 60 Capsules, or Net Weight: 30 g drift from the approved pack when readable in frame
reject and regenerate if extra invented subtitle text appears on the front label
reject and regenerate if the bottle body shifts away from deep matte black, the cap stops being black and ribbed, or the white neck band disappears
reject and regenerate if the bottle does not match the scene's lighting, reflections, shadows, and camera angle naturally
composition: same routine environment as shots 01 and 02
hand entering frame to place the bottle beside water or a notebook
product occupies roughly one-third of the frame
leave calm breathing room around the product
reference_strategy: Keep the April 1 lifestyle world from the Set 4 working example, use the hand-held source for true product scale and hand relationship, and let the product-glow anchor add only subtle polish.
variation_guardrails: do not isolate the bottle on a plain ad background
do not make the product feel louder than the human routine context
keep the reveal softer and more integrated than March 25
reject and regenerate if the bottle looks glossy, metallic, or not matte black
notes: April 1 reel shot 03. Introduce the real Mitozz bottle naturally into the same calm morning ritual. Keep the real bottle design intact and do not redesign, recolor, simplify, or relabel the bottle. The bottle must stay deep matte black with a black ribbed cap, a visible pale white neck band below the cap, and a predominantly black front face with a readable white MITOZZ wordmark. The visible front label must also keep 60 Capsules at bottom left and Net Weight: 30 g at bottom right when readable in frame. Do not invent extra subtitle copy that is not clearly supported by the approved reference. Use the Mitozz bottle size spec for believable lifestyle scale.
product_realism_lock: keep the approved Mitozz bottle design locked
do not redesign the label or simplify the visible pack blocks
preserve the bottle appearance exactly: deep matte black body, black ribbed cap, visible pale white neck band below the cap, and predominantly black front face
preserve the visible front-label wording MITOZZ, 60 Capsules, and Net Weight: 30 g when readable in frame
adapt the locked bottle to the surrounding shot's light direction, reflections, shadow falloff, and camera angle
the bottle must feel photographed in the scene, not pasted on top
